title: ForgeBrain Memory State
description: Defines the shape of ForgeBrain's memory state: what has been taught, what is queued, and how content has performed. Read and written by the Curriculum Engine and Topic Memory components described in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

memory_version.description: Version of this memory schema, so future code can detect and migrate older memory files.

language.description: Content domain this memory state tracks. Fixed to java for Phase 1.

last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last write to this memory state.

current_topic_id.description: topic_id of the topic currently being worked on through the pipeline, if any. Null when nothing is in progress.

queue.description: Ordered list of topics selected to be taught next, most immediate first.

recently_used_hooks.description: Recently used opening hooks/lines, tracked independently of topic so a revisited topic doesn't repeat the exact same opening.

recently_used_examples.description: Recently used code examples or teaching examples, tracked so a revisited topic doesn't repeat the exact same example.

topics.description: Map of topic_id to its topic record. Keyed for direct O(1) lookup by code, mirroring topic ids used in curriculum/java-roadmap.json.

topic_id.description: References a topic id from curriculum/java-roadmap.json.

priority.description: Manual or system-assigned priority influencing queue ordering.

queued_at.description: When this topic was added to the queue.

reason.description: Optional short note on why this topic was queued (e.g. 'next in prerequisite chain', 'revisit after low retention').

topic_id.description: Topic the hook or example was used for.

content.description: The hook line or example description that was used.

audienceResponse.description: Performance signals sourced from analytics, once available. All fields default to null until Phase 1's analytics integration exists.

topicRecord.description: Tracked state for a single curriculum topic.

topic_id.description: Matches the corresponding id in curriculum/java-roadmap.json.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of this topic within the memory system.

difficulty.description: Mirrors the difficulty tier from the curriculum roadmap.

times_used.description: How many times this topic has been produced into a reel.

last_used_at.description: Last time this topic entered the production pipeline, regardless of publish status.

last_posted_at.description: Last time a reel for this topic was actually published.

revision_count.description: How many times this topic's content has been revised after review or after underperforming.

performance_score.description: Normalized 0-1 score summarizing how well this topic's reel(s) performed. Null until at least one reel has data.

retention_score.description: Normalized 0-1 score summarizing average viewer retention for this topic's reel(s).

priority.description: Influences topic selection ordering independent of queue position.

avoid_until.description: If set, this topic is excluded from selection until this date has passed. Used for cooldown after recent use or after underperformance.

related_topics.description: topic_ids of related topics, mirroring curriculum related_topics once populated.

notes.description: Free-text notes, e.g. why a topic underperformed or what to change on revision.

hooks_used.description: Convenience list of hook lines used for this topic. Duplicates entries also tracked globally in recently_used_hooks.

examples_used.description: Convenience list of examples used for this topic. Duplicates entries also tracked globally in recently_used_examples.

globalStats.description: Aggregate state that doesn't belong to any single topic.
